items_flat.title_en: Sam Altman Invites Builds with GPT-5.6 Sol, Offers OpenAI Archive Gift
items_flat.title_zh: Sam Altman邀請用GPT-5.6 Sol打造專案，提供OpenAI檔案館禮物
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman posted on X encouraging users to share interesting projects built with GPT-5.6 Sol. He offered to send the creator of the coolest thing a special gift from the OpenAI archives.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI執行長Sam Altman在X上發文，鼓勵使用者分享用GPT-5.6 Sol打造的有趣專案。他承諾將寄送OpenAI檔案館特別禮物給做出最酷作品的創作者。
items_flat.quote: i'd love to see interesting things people have built with 5.6 sol. i will send the person who made the coolest thing a special gift from the openai archives.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「我很想看看大家用5.6 sol打造的有趣東西。我會把OpenAI檔案館的特別禮物寄給做出最酷作品的人。」

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk Notes Grok 4.5 Benchmark Edge Over Fable; Grok Build Gets Keyboard Upgrades
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk指出Grok 4.5基準略勝Fable；Grok Build獲鍵盤功能升級
items_flat.summary_en: xAI's Elon Musk stated that Grok 4.5 ranks slightly above Claude Fable 5 on some software benchmarks. Grok Build also received recent updates adding smoother navigation and improved features.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI的Elon Musk表示Grok 4.5在部分軟體基準測試中略高於Claude Fable 5。Grok Build近期更新帶來更順暢導航與改進功能。
items_flat.quote: Grok 4.5 even ranks slightly above Fable, which is an incredibly good model, on some software benchmarks!
items_flat.quote_zh: 「Grok 4.5 在某些軟體基準測試中甚至略高於 Fable，而 Fable 是一個非常優秀的模型！」

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Extends Claude Fable 5 Paid Plan Access and Higher Claude Code Limits Through July 19
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic將Claude Fable 5付費方案存取及Claude Code更高限額延長至7月19日
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic announced via @claudeai on X that it is extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans through July 19, allowing up to half of weekly usage limits on Fable 5 with continued access via usage credits afterward. It is also keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic透過@claudeai在X宣布，將所有付費方案的Claude Fable 5存取延長至7月19日，允許使用每週限額的一半，之後可透過使用額度繼續存取。同時維持Claude Code每週限額提高50%。
items_flat.quote: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「我們將Claude Fable 5在所有付費方案的存取延長至7月19日，同時維持Claude Code每週限額提高50%。」

openai.title_en: Sam Altman Invites Builds with GPT-5.6 Sol, Offers OpenAI Archive Gift
openai.title_zh: Sam Altman邀請用GPT-5.6 Sol打造專案，提供OpenAI檔案館禮物
openai.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman posted on X encouraging users to share interesting projects built with GPT-5.6 Sol. He offered to send the creator of the coolest thing a special gift from the OpenAI archives.

openai.quote: i'd love to see interesting things people have built with 5.6 sol. i will send the person who made the coolest thing a special gift from the openai archives.

anthropic.title_en: Anthropic Extends Claude Fable 5 Paid Plan Access and Higher Claude Code Limits Through July 19
anthropic.title_zh: Anthropic將Claude Fable 5付費方案存取及Claude Code更高限額延長至7月19日
anthropic.summary_en: Anthropic announced via @claudeai on X that it is extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans through July 19, allowing up to half of weekly usage limits on Fable 5 with continued access via usage credits afterward. It is also keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher.
anthropic.summary_zh: Anthropic透過@claudeai在X宣布，將所有付費方案的Claude Fable 5存取延長至7月19日，允許使用每週限額的一半，之後可透過使用額度繼續存取。同時維持Claude Code每週限額提高50%。
anthropic.quote: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.
anthropic.quote_zh: 「我們將Claude Fable 5在所有付費方案的存取延長至7月19日，同時維持Claude Code每週限額提高50%。」

xai.title_en: Elon Musk Notes Grok 4.5 Benchmark Edge Over Fable; Grok Build Gets Keyboard Upgrades
xai.title_zh: Elon Musk指出Grok 4.5基準略勝Fable；Grok Build獲鍵盤功能升級
xai.summary_en: xAI's Elon Musk stated that Grok 4.5 ranks slightly above Claude Fable 5 on some software benchmarks. Grok Build also received recent updates adding smoother navigation and improved features.
xai.summary_zh: xAI的Elon Musk表示Grok 4.5在部分軟體基準測試中略高於Claude Fable 5。Grok Build近期更新帶來更順暢導航與改進功能。
xai.quote: Grok 4.5 even ranks slightly above Fable, which is an incredibly good model, on some software benchmarks!
xai.quote_zh: 「Grok 4.5 在某些軟體基準測試中甚至略高於 Fable，而 Fable 是一個非常優秀的模型！」

brief_en: Quiet day across frontier labs. OpenAI's Sam Altman continues promoting builds with GPT-5.6 Sol. xAI's Elon Musk highlights Grok 4.5 benchmark edge. Anthropic extends Claude Fable 5 paid access through July 19.
brief_zh: 今日前沿AI大廠動態平靜。OpenAI的Sam Altman持續推廣GPT-5.6 Sol建構專案；xAI的Elon Musk指出Grok 4.5基準優勢；Anthropic將Claude Fable 5付費存取延長至7月19日。
